meaning: n.照相制版,太阳摄影机,日光仪v.用太阳摄影机拍摄,用日光仪传递
examples: The feature of optical fiber transmission system and its effect on the solar radio heliograph are analyzed in this article.
By using data of Nobeyama radio heliograph, we calculate value of magnetic field in lower corona in some active region from thermal bremsstrahlung, and preliminary result has been obtained.
